chapter_title.en: Chapter on Reviving Barren Lands and Properties

text: اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَنْ غَرَسَ شَجَراً بَدْءاً أَوْ حَفَرَ وَادِياً لَمْ يَسْبِقْهُ إِلَيْهِ أَحَدٌ أَوْ أَحْيَا أَرْضاً مَيْتَةً فَهِيَ لَهُ قَضَاءً مِنَ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ رَسُولِهِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3877 - The Prophet (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said:
"Whoever plants a tree from the beginning, or digs a valley that no one has preceded him in, or revives dead land, then it belongs to him, this is a decree from Allah (swt), the Mighty and Glorious, and His Messenger."
